text:
ままじゃ、イベント中止になっちゃう！
どうか手を貸してくれないかな？
邪魔する敵を追っ払ってきてほしいの！

※Ｌｖ．１～のエネミーが対象

This is bad!
There’s a bunch of enemies messing
with everyone working at the venue.
They even tore up all the raffle
tickets we made out of paper...
We’ll have to cancel the event!
Unless you can help! Please?
Get them out of here!

Enemies must be Level 1 or above
